subcodes.first_line: O Abbas! This is the Day whereon the King of humanity is established upon the throne, and His glance of grace is turned towards His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عباس امروز روزیست که پادشاه ناس بر عرش مستوی و لحاظ عنایتش متوجه دوستانش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation
